features.name: release statement conflicting with always_comb assignment
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block that continuously assigns to a variable, and a clocked always block that releases the same variable, causing the release to incorrectly interfere with the always_comb logic

features.name: release statement conflicting with assign statement
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment driving a variable and a clocked always block that releases the same variable, where the release incorrectly interferes with the assign

features.name: combo logic driven by multiple sources with release
features.description: Code should include variables driven by both always_comb and assign statements, with release statements applied in a clocked always block, causing oscillation in the driven signals
